---
title: "About the lab"
---

::: column-margin
Funding:

::: {#funding}
::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![](images/nsercLogo.png){fig-alt="NSERC logo"}

![](images/mcgill.png){fig-alt="McGill logo"}

![](images/cirmmt.png){fig-alt="CIRMMT logo"}

![](images/vhrn.png){fig-alt="VHRN logo"}

![](images/ivado.png){fig-alt="IVADO logo"}

![](images/unique.png){fig-alt="UNIQUE logo"}
:::
:::
:::

We can be reached at this [address](mailto: m2b3.lab@mcgill.ca).

Lab locations

We are located in the [Department of Physiology](https://www.mcgill.ca/physiology/) at McGill, and also work at [CIRMMT](https://www.cirmmt.org/en) (the Center for Interdisciplinary Research in Music and Media Technology), [BRAMS](https://brams.org/) (International laboratory for Brain, Music and Sound Research), the [Neuro](https://www.mcgill.ca/neuro/) (Montreal Neurological Institute) and the [CHUM](https://www.chumontreal.qc.ca/) (Centre hospitalier de l'Université de Montréal).

We are also a part of [UNIQUE](https://www.unique.quebec/) (the Montreal Neuro-AI grouping), the [CRM](https://www.crmath.ca/en/) (Center for Research in Mathematics), the [QBIN](https://rbiq-qbin.qc.ca/) (Quebec Bio-Imaging network), the [VHRN](https://visionnetwork.ca/) (Vision Health Research Network), the [CRIR](https://crir.ca/en/) (Centre for Interdisciplinary Research in Rehabilitation of Greater Montreal), and the [CRBLM](https://crblm.ca/) (Center for Research in Brain, Language and Music).
